text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 244 

SPLMTL_DTS 

LABEL: Beneficiary Record in Supplemental Dates File 

DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate that there is record in the Eligibility Dates supplemental file for this person. 

SHORT NAME: SPLMTL_DTS 

LONG NAME: SPLMTL_DTS 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): Annual DE base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes
